subparts.text: Define research and differentiate between fundamental and applied research with examples? 2.5
What are research metrics? Explain their role in evaluating research quality. 2.5
Discuss the importance of research publication and the role of open- access journals. 2.5
Explain the concept of research design and the significance of sampling in research. 2.5
Explain the significance of research problem formulation and hypothesis development in the research process. 5
What are different citation databases ? How do they help researchers? 5
Discuss the differences between systematic review and meta-analysis. Why are they important in research? 5
What are the essential components of a well-structured research paper? Explain the role of each component. 5
Define data collection and explain different methods used in research, including their advantages and limitations. 5
Discuss the importance of authorship, conferences, and research ethics in scientific writing and publication. 5
